description: A front office manager needs to create the staff schedule for the upcoming week.

nodes.task_description: Review the hotel's occupancy forecast for the next week to determine staffing needs.

expected_outcome.value: Manager notes high occupancy for the weekend, requiring extra staff.

nodes.task_description: Check staff availability and time-off requests.

expected_outcome.value: Manager reviews all approved time-off for the week.

nodes.task_description: Generate a draft schedule using the scheduling software, ensuring all shifts are covered.

expected_outcome.value: A complete draft schedule is generated.

nodes.task_description: Publish the final schedule and notify the staff.

expected_outcome.value: The schedule is published, and staff receive a notification.
